title: GokiSkills
description: Unlock and upgrade your skills by experience!
body:
# GokiSkills GokiSkills is a skill mod for Minecraft, it's a port of [GokiStats (CurseForge)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/gokistats) to higher versions. ## Support versions
Versions
  • 1.18.2 - ⭕
  • 1.19.2 - ⭕
  • 1.20.1 - ✔️
  • 1.20.2 - 🔨
  • 1.20.4 - 🔨
  • 1.20.6 - 🔨
  • 1.21, 1.21.1 - ✔️
  • 1.21.2, 1.21.3 - 🔨
  • 1.21.4 - 🔨
  • 1.21.5 - 🔨
  • 1.21.6 - 🔨
  • 1.21.7, 1.21.8 - ✔️
  • Latest minecraft version - ✔️
* ✔️ - Full Support * ⭕ - Only big updates * 🔨 - Only bug fixes * ❌ - No longer Supports ## Skills
Abilities
  • Climbing
    Climb faster
  • Health
    Increase your health
  • Leaper
    Jump farther
  • Jump Boost
    Jump higher
Breaking
  • Chopping
    Break faster with axes
  • Digging
    Break faster with shovels
  • Harvesting
    Break faster with hoes
  • Mining
    Break faster with pickaxes
  • Shearing
    Break faster with shears
Profession
  • Archer
    Deal more damage with bows and crossbows
  • Boxing
    Deal more damage when not using weapons
  • Fencing
    Deal more damage with swords
  • Ninja
    Move faster and deal more damage while sneaking
  • One Hit Killing
    Have a chance to kill a mob by one hit
Protection
  • Blast Protection
    Take less damage from explosions
  • Dodge
    Have a chance of avoiding damage
  • Endothermy
    Take less damage from burning and freezing
  • Feather Falling
    Take less damage from falling
  • Knockback Resistance
    Reduce knockback
  • Damage Absorption
    Take less damage from mob attacks
